description: A comprehensive study of the Ottoman Empire, one of history's longest-lasting empires that ruled across Europe, Asia, and Africa for over 600 years. From its humble beginnings as a small Anatolian beylik to its transformation into a global superpower and eventual decline.

topics.title: Origins of the Ottoman State
topics.subtitle: The rise of Osman I and the founding of the Ottoman dynasty

topics.title: Early Expansion under Orhan
topics.subtitle: Consolidation in Anatolia and first European foothold

topics.title: Murad I and the Janissary Corps
topics.subtitle: Military innovations and the creation of the elite slave-soldier force

topics.title: The Battle of Kosovo
topics.subtitle: Ottoman victory that opened the path to Balkan dominance

topics.title: Bayezid I and the Interregnum Crisis
topics.subtitle: Rapid expansion followed by defeat at Ankara and civil war

topics.title: Mehmed I's Restoration
topics.subtitle: Reunification of the empire after the Ottoman civil war

topics.title: The Conquest of Constantinople
topics.subtitle: Mehmed II captures the Byzantine capital and creates a new empire

topics.title: Selim I and Eastern Expansion
topics.subtitle: The conquest of the Mamluk Sultanate and assumption of the Caliphate

topics.title: Suleiman the Magnificent's Golden Age
topics.subtitle: Military campaigns, legal reforms, and cultural flowering

topics.title: The Siege of Vienna
topics.subtitle: The high-water mark of Ottoman expansion into Europe

topics.title: Ottoman Naval Power and Barbarossa
topics.subtitle: Dominance in the Mediterranean and alliance with corsairs

topics.title: The Battle of Lepanto
topics.subtitle: Major naval defeat that ended Ottoman Mediterranean supremacy

topics.title: The Long Turkish War
topics.subtitle: Prolonged conflict with the Habsburgs marking military decline

topics.title: The Great Turkish War and Treaty of Karlowitz
topics.subtitle: Ottoman territorial losses and the beginning of permanent retreat

topics.title: The Tulip Period
topics.subtitle: Cultural renaissance and attempted modernization under Ahmed III

topics.title: Selim III and Early Reform Attempts
topics.subtitle: First systematic efforts to modernize the Ottoman military and state

topics.title: The Greek War of Independence
topics.subtitle: Nationalist uprising that weakened Ottoman control in the Balkans

topics.title: The Tanzimat Reforms
topics.subtitle: Comprehensive modernization program to save the empire

topics.title: The Young Turk Revolution
topics.subtitle: Constitutional movement and the empire's final modernization attempt

topics.title: World War I and the Empire's End
topics.subtitle: Ottoman participation in WWI and the empire's dissolution
